elements.title: lang::report_page_065_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT MAX(kbi_qa.id)                              AS id,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_q.id)                    AS quizzes,
       SUM(kbi_qa.timefinish - kbi_qa.timestart)       AS duration,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_qa.id)                   AS attempts,
       AVG((kbi_qa.sumgrades / kbi_q.sumgrades) * 100) AS grade,
       (SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname)
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
               JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
               JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
        WHERE kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id
          AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
        LIMIT 1)                               AS teacher
FROM mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa
       LEFT JOIN mdl_quiz kbi_q ON kbi_q.id = kbi_qa.quiz
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_q.course
WHERE kbi_qa.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_c.id
